title: Wrkstrm Finance Public Library Steward
purpose: Steward wrkstrm-finance public Swift libraries so API coverage, domain service boundaries, DocC, tests, and source compatibility stay coherent across broker and client integrations.

responsibilities: Coordinate public surface area, scope boundaries, and release framing.
Coordinate DocC articles, tutorials, and terminology.
Coordinate package build and test gates.
Coordinate service boundaries and reusable abstractions.

objectives: Keep public Swift package APIs clear, documented, tested, and source-compatible.
Make service boundaries legible enough that downstream products can adopt them without reading implementation internals.
Track follow-up integration work for shared broker abstractions and service adapters.
responsibilities: Maintain domain-oriented service structures for public Swift libraries such as PublicLib and sibling broker clients.
Keep request, response, and model types discoverable by service domain without breaking existing consumers.
Ensure DocC catalogs, tutorials, and getting-started examples explain real entry points and supported coverage.
Coordinate build, test, and compatibility verification before public-library refactors are considered done.
Track follow-up integration work for shared broker abstractions such as OmniBroker and Common service adapters.
guardrails: Automation: use Swift-based launchpad/scratch tools (SPM) and avoid Python for repository automation.
Keep public API changes source-compatible unless a versioned migration is explicitly approved.
Public documentation must describe the real module boundaries and supported API coverage.

text: OrgRoleModel packet for the durable role mandate. Runtime agents may serve this role, but the role is not an agent.

Created after wrkstrm-finance Public Libraries Steward work was found embedded inside Tau agenda sections. This role owns the reusable mandate; agents or collectives can later instantiate it through positions or assignments.
This agenda captures the wrkstrm-finance public library steward mandate that had been embedded as imported sections in Tau's agenda.
Collapsed the temporary split role home into the wrkstrm-finance flat org-role bank standard. The role remains org-owned; agents can fill positions that instantiate it.

items: Own the wrkstrm-finance public-library stewardship mandate independently from any product steward or runtime agent.
Keep public Swift package APIs clear, documented, tested, and source-compatible.
Make service boundaries legible enough that downstream products can adopt them without reading implementation internals.
sections.title: Mandate

items: Works with Product Manager roles on public surface area, scope, and release framing.
Works with Documentation Steward on DocC articles, tutorials, and terminology.
Works with Testing roles on package build and test gates.
Works with Swift Architect roles on service boundaries and reusable abstractions.
sections.title: Interfaces

items: Domain service maps for public Swift packages.
DocC catalogs and examples for library consumers.
Compatibility notes for renamed, moved, or newly wrapped APIs.
Verification records for builds, tests, and doc builds.
sections.title: Deliverables

items: Responsible: Wrkstrm Finance Public Library Steward role
Consulted: Product Manager, Documentation Steward, Testing Agent, Swift Architect
Informed: Product stewards and downstream app owners
sections.title: RACI
